mapper.select: SELECT * FROM complaints WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT * FROM complaints ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complaints WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO complaints (complainant_id, target_type, target_id, reason, description, status, result, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{complainantId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reason}, #{description}, #{status}, #{result}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE complaints SET status = #{status}, result = #{result}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
